sections.label: Verse 1
lines: When darkness gathers like a storm
And wisdom whispers "Flee like birds"
My spirit finds its ancient home
In truths that shake but cannot be unheard
For You remain enthroned above
Your eyes pierce through the deepest night

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Let foundations crumble into dust
Still my heart will choose to trust
Though arrows fly and mountains fall
You remain my all in all
In the shadow of Your wings
I find my refuge as I sing

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: From heaven's heights You bend to see
Each heart that beats, each tear that falls
Your justice flows like endless streams
Your mercy echoes through these walls
The righteous walk through trials of fire
Yet emerge with faces bright as dawn

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Let foundations crumble into dust
Still my heart will choose to trust
Though arrows fly and mountains fall
You remain my all in all
In the shadow of Your wings
I find my refuge as I sing

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Test me, Lord, and try my heart
Strip away what keeps us apart
Though the wicked bend their bow
Your truth is all I need to know

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: Let foundations crumble into dust
Still my heart will choose to trust
Though arrows fly and mountains fall
You remain my all in all
In the shadow of Your wings
I find my peace, my hope, my spring
In the shadow of Your wings
I find my refuge as I sing
